purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

current.goal: Expand released scope ceiling from pageReadyObserved to runCompletion. Promote all 8 modeled missions to released status.
current.phase: Phase R67 — scope expansion: pageReadyObserved to runCompletion
current.milestone: All 8 modeled missions promoted to released, full 12-mission pipeline
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling expands from pageReadyObserved to runCompletion. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine.

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.phase: Phase R67 — scope expansion: pageReadyObserved to runCompletion
history.milestone: All 8 modeled missions promoted to released, full 12-mission pipeline
history.summary: scope-expansion-mission-registry complete: Promoted all 8 modeled missions to RELEASED_MISSIONS (sync_observation through run_completion at indices 4-11). Set MODELED_MISSIONS to empty tuple. Updated runtime.py with index-based scope ceiling check (prepareSession=1, pageReadyObserved=3, runCompletion=11). Changed DEFAULT_RELEASED_SCOPE_CEILING to runCompletion. Updated 17 test files to expect 12 released missions and new ceiling logic. All validation clean.
evidence: src/ez_ax/missions/names.py: RELEASED_MISSIONS has 12 entries, MODELED_MISSIONS empty
src/ez_ax/models/runtime.py: mission_is_within_approved_scope uses index-based ceiling check

All test files updated: test_released_missions_specification.py, test_presenting_modeled_behavior_forbidden.py, test_runtime_state.py, test_release_ceiling_non_expansion_without_prd_change.py, test_execution_adapter_contract.py, test_browser_facing_execution_ownership.py, test_ez_ax_is_orchestration_centric.py, test_ez_ax_owns_validation_stopping_reasoning.py, test_released_scope_graph_rejects_modeled_missions.py, test_runtime_graph.py, test_runtime_settings.py, test_runtime_graph_plan.py

history.phase: Phases R3-R65 — Foundation through FINAL_STOP (Compressed History)
history.milestone: All 65 families covered, FINAL_STOP verified at pageReadyObserved ceiling
history.summary: Cumulative compression of Phases R3-R65. 65 families total: 36 foundation, 13 heuristic, then progressive exhaustion verification through R65. All released-scope PRD clauses below pageReadyObserved verified with dedicated unit test coverage. 746 tests passing. Real-environment E2E scaffold established. FINAL_STOP reached and verified via stop-state consistency gate. Architecture clarified: adapters/openclaw renamed to adapters/execution to reflect factual ownership (OpenClaw is external caller, ez-ax owns CUA engine). Phase R66 excluded (superseded by scope expansion decision).
evidence: FINAL_STOP verified via autoloop stop-state consistency gate
746 tests passing, mypy clean, ruff clean
